entries.word: Do you have a similar proverb in French?
entries.translation: У вас во французском языке есть похожая поговорка?

entries.word: Tom is saying something.
Are you saying I'm a liar?
I can't hear what you're saying.
entries.translation: Мне не слышно, что вы говорите.

entries.word: Bite the bullet.
Everyone's saying it.
I'm saying no.
What're you saying?
What are they saying?
Tom isn't saying why.
It goes without saying.
What's your favorite saying?
Why are you saying that to me?
The saying is quite familiar to us.
Tom isn't saying anything.
Are you saying it's not safe here?
entries.translation: Ты хочешь сказать, что здесь небезопасно?

entries.word: I got the gist of what he was saying.
Are you saying there were problems?
That's not what I was saying.
Why are you saying this?
Why are they saying this?
Tom doesn't know what he's saying.
Are you saying Tom isn't Canadian?
entries.translation: Ты хочешь сказать, Том не канадец?

entries.word: What were you saying to Tom?
I'm not saying no.
I'm just saying it's possible.
entries.translation: Я просто говорю, что это возможно.

entries.word: Are you saying Tom isn't from Boston?
entries.translation: Ты хочешь сказать, Том не из Бостона?

entries.word: Are you saying that you killed Tom?
entries.translation: Ты хочешь сказать, что убил Тома?

entries.word: What you're saying isn't logical.
He went off without saying good-bye.
What were you saying?
I know what I'm saying.
I can't imagine a native speaker ever saying it that way.
entries.translation: Не представляю себе, чтобы носитель языка мог так сказать.

entries.word: Are you saying you don't know?
I've been saying that for months.
entries.translation: Я уже несколько месяцев это говорю.

entries.word: Stop saying those kinds of things.
People are saying that the crisis is over.
Who doesn't know such a simple proverb?
entries.translation: Кто не знает такую простую поговорку?

entries.word: I wonder if the parrot knows what it's saying.
entries.translation: Интересно, понимает ли попугай то, что говорит.

entries.word: Saying and doing are two different things.
entries.translation: Сказать и сделать – это разные вещи.

entries.word: Are you saying it's over?
What you have just said reminds me of an old saying.
entries.translation: То, что вы только что сказали, напоминает мне старую поговорку.

entries.word: They're saying that Tom won't do it.
entries.translation: Они говорят, что Том не будет этого делать.

entries.word: That's not what I'm saying.
entries.translation: Это не то, что я говорю.

entries.word: I've been saying that all along.
I don't remember saying anything.
entries.translation: Я не помню, чтобы я что-нибудь говорил.

entries.word: Are you saying that you don't remember?
entries.translation: Ты хочешь сказать, что не помнишь?

entries.word: Are you saying Tom lied?
It's a saying.
Did you spill the beans?
I can't make out what she is saying.
entries.translation: Я не могу разобрать, что она говорит.

entries.word: Are you saying there's still a chance?
Tom understood what Mary was saying.
We couldn't hear what Tom was saying.
entries.translation: Нам не было слышно, что Том говорит.

entries.word: Tom realized that Mary wasn't paying attention to what he was saying.
entries.translation: Фома понял, что Маша не обращала внимания на его слова.

entries.word: What were they saying?
That goes without saying.
I'm not saying it's easy.
entries.translation: Я не говорю, что это просто.

entries.word: I can't make out what the man is saying.
entries.translation: Я не могу разобрать, что говорит этот человек.

entries.word: I concentrated on what he was saying.
entries.translation: Я сосредоточился на том, что он говорил.

entries.word: Did you hear what they were saying?
I'm not saying anything.
Are you saying this doesn't matter?
I get what you're saying.
I like this saying.
What you're saying doesn't make sense.
entries.translation: То, что ты говоришь, не имеет смысла.

entries.word: Tom has been saying that for years.
entries.translation: Том уже много лет это говорит.

entries.word: This proverb is worth remembering.
Finish what you were saying.
Many people are saying this.
Tom has been saying mean things about you.
It goes without saying that nothing is more important than health.
entries.translation: Само собой разумеется, что нет ничего важнее здоровья.

entries.word: Everything he's saying is slander.
He answered by saying that he could swim well.
entries.translation: Он ответил, что умеет хорошо плавать.

entries.word: I couldn't hear what they were saying.
entries.translation: Мне не было слышно, что они говорят.

entries.word: Are you saying Tom is dying?
I am afraid he is going to spill the beans.
She walked away without saying good bye.
Nobody was listening to what Tom was saying.
entries.translation: Никто не слушал, что говорит Том.

entries.word: As the saying goes, "Nothing ventured, nothing gained."
entries.translation: Как говорится, "кто не рискует, тот не выигрывает".

entries.word: Are you saying I shouldn't be doing this?
entries.translation: Ты хочешь сказать, что мне не стоит этого делать?

entries.word: That's my favorite saying.
Tom walked away without saying anything.
Tom dismissed what Mary was saying.
entries.translation: Том пропустил мимо ушей сказанное Мэри.

entries.word: Are you saying that I'm a liar?
What's your favorite proverb?
What you're saying now has nothing to do with the question.
entries.translation: То, что ты сейчас говоришь, не имеет отношения к вопросу.

entries.word: I don't like what you're saying.
entries.translation: Мне не нравится то, что ты говоришь.

entries.word: This is a proverb.
I hear what you're saying.
You aren't listening to what I'm saying.
entries.translation: Ты не слушаешь, что я говорю.

entries.word: Tom looked at Mary without saying anything.
Let's hit the sack.
This is an idiom.
Doesn't that go without saying?
entries.translation: Разве это не само собой разумеется?

entries.word: What was I saying?
Are you saying I'm mad?
entries.translation: Ты хочешь сказать, что я ненормальный?

entries.word: Don't you hear what I'm saying?
entries.translation: Вы не слышите, что я говорю?

entries.word: That isn't what I was saying at all.
What's Tom saying?
I see what you're saying.
I don't remember saying I like Tom.
entries.translation: Не помню, чтобы я говорил, что мне нравится Том.

entries.word: What was Tom saying?
I can't hear what they're saying.
entries.translation: Я не могу расслышать, что они говорят.

entries.word: That isn't what I'm saying.
Do you have a similar saying in Japanese?
entries.translation: У вас в японском есть похожая поговорка?

entries.word: Are you saying that Tom is a traitor?
Tom wasn't paying attention to what Mary was saying.
It's just a saying.
Everyone's thinking it, but no one's saying it.
entries.translation: Все так думают, но никто не говорит.

entries.word: Why aren't you saying anything?
"A rolling stone gathers no moss" is a proverb.
entries.translation: "Под лежачий камень вода не течёт" — это пословица.

entries.word: We couldn't hear what you were saying.
entries.translation: Нам было не слышно, что вы говорите.

entries.word: Tom concluded his speech with a proverb.
It was raining cats and dogs outside.
entries.translation: На улице лило как из ведра.

entries.word: Are you saying Tom is a liar?
I could hardly hear what Tom was saying.
entries.translation: Мне почти не было слышно, что Том говорит.

entries.word: Are you saying that you don't like it here?
entries.translation: Ты хочешь сказать, тебе здесь не нравится?

entries.word: I can't make out what you're saying.
entries.translation: Не могу разобрать, что ты говоришь.

entries.word: Are you saying Tom is a thief?
entries.translation: Ты хочешь сказать, что Том вор?

entries.word: Are you saying you don't want to go?
entries.translation: То есть вы не хотите идти?

entries.word: Can you hear what Tom is saying?
What's your basis for saying this?
entries.translation: На каком основании вы это говорите?

entries.word: So what're you saying?
I'm saying nothing.
I kept saying that I didn't want to die.
entries.translation: Я всё повторял, что не хочу умирать.

entries.word: Thanks for saying so.
Are you saying no?
Listen, he doesn't know what he's saying.
entries.translation: Послушай, он не знает, что говорит.

entries.word: Don't spill the beans.
Do you hear what I'm saying?
Do you know what you're saying?
I hear everything you're saying.
entries.translation: Я слышу всё, что ты говоришь.

entries.word: Are you saying that I killed Tom?
Do you realize what you're saying?
I've been saying the same thing.
I listened but couldn't make out what they were saying.
entries.translation: Я слушал, но не мог взять в толк, о чём они говорят.

entries.word: Are you saying Tom didn't win?
entries.translation: Ты хочешь сказать, Том не выиграл?

entries.word: Tom nodded without saying anything.
That's a very old saying.
I'm not saying it's impossible.
entries.translation: Я не говорю, что это невозможно.

entries.word: It's raining cats and dogs here.
Are you saying that Tom is dangerous?
entries.translation: Ты хочешь сказать, что Том опасен?

entries.word: What are you saying?
Are you saying that you give up?
